message:
feat: theme-coherent markdown rendering, role gutters, and refined UI tokens

Replace hardcoded MarkdownTheme::default() with StyleContext::markdown_theme()
that derives all markdown element colors from the active resolved theme, ensuring
markdown content in the detail pane is visually consistent with the rest of the
UI across all theme presets (Dark, Light, Solarized, Tokyo Night, etc.).

Key changes:

- Add StyleContext::markdown_theme() that maps resolved theme colors to every
  MarkdownTheme field (headings, code blocks, links, admonitions, etc.) with
  appropriate blended backgrounds for inline code and code blocks
- Introduce role_gutter_style() returning per-role colored left-margin indicators
  (▌) for User/Agent/Tool/System messages in the conversation detail view,
  providing a strong visual anchor for message boundaries
- Prefix every content line (markdown-rendered and plain text) with the role
  gutter span so the colored bar runs the full height of each message
- Use dedicated STYLE_TAB_ACTIVE / STYLE_TAB_INACTIVE tokens for the detail
  pane tab bar instead of repurposing STYLE_STATUS_INFO / STYLE_TEXT_MUTED
- Add background color to STYLE_TAB_ACTIVE and STYLE_PILL_ACTIVE so active
  tabs and filter pills visually "pop" rather than relying solely on foreground
- Use STYLE_KBD_KEY / STYLE_KBD_DESC for footer key hints instead of generic
  status/muted tokens
- Use STYLE_PILL_ACTIVE for active filter pill text
- Add padding around active tab label for better visual separation
- Adjust plain-text wrap width to account for the new 2-char gutter prefix
- Comprehensive test coverage: pill/tab background presence across all presets,
  tab/pill style uniqueness, markdown theme derivation from resolved colors,
  code block backgrounds, link underline, cross-preset differentiation
- Update beads issue tracker with latest status

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
